name: com.vk.audio
description: Data-driven, low-allocation audio system for Unity 6 VR-first projects. Pooled voices, weighted clip selection, music/ambience crossfades, snapshot-free ducking, persisted settings, and optional Event Service / Reflex / Addressables integration. Self-bootstrapping core with zero gameplay coupling.

samples.description: Minimal usage example using the static AudioSystem locator.
AudioReflexInstaller binding IAudioService into a Reflex container.
IAudioSettingsStore adapter template for your project's SaveSystem.
